scenes.preview_ch: 朋友啊…留下吧，留在冥界，与我们一同享受这永恒静谧的月光……
scenes.preview_en: My friend... stay here. Remain in the nether realm with us and savor this eternal, serene moonlight together...

scenes.preview_ch: 你逃不掉的，悬锋的狗蝇！
scenes.preview_en: You won't get away, Kremnoan vermin!

scenes.preview_ch: 等等，不对…大家小心！
scenes.preview_en: Wait, no... Look out, everyone!

scenes.preview_ch: …我曾经的战友们。
scenes.preview_en: ...My old comrades.

scenes.preview_ch: 真是…沉重的试炼啊。
scenes.preview_en: ...What a grave trial indeed.

scenes.preview_ch: 边走边摸索，找找看吧。
scenes.preview_en: Let's be on the lookout as we go.

scenes.preview_ch: 出发前，还有些人要见。
scenes.preview_en: There are some people to meet with before I leave.

scenes.preview_ch: 哈托努斯！
scenes.preview_en: Chartonus!

scenes.preview_ch: 就像前几日，有人诋毁我族的荣耀时，你的态度也是放任，不是么？
scenes.preview_en: A few days ago, when people were besmirching my tribe's honor, didn't you also turn a blind eye?

scenes.preview_ch: 你们果然来了。
scenes.preview_en: Great to see you here!

scenes.preview_ch: 这个大家伙，莫非是真言狮口？
scenes.preview_en: Wow, look at this big guy. Could this be Verax Leo?

scenes.preview_ch: 等等，这是先前提到的石板，只凭我们无法解读。
scenes.preview_en: Hold on. This is the slate that I mentioned earlier, the one we cannot decipher on our own.

scenes.preview_ch: 终于，都结束了。
scenes.preview_en: It's finally over.

scenes.preview_ch: 还是晚来了一步么……
scenes.preview_en: Still too late, huh...

scenes.preview_ch: 一如既往，灵魂的幻象于斯消散。
scenes.preview_en: As always, the illusion of spirits dissipates here.

scenes.preview_ch: {NICKNAME}，千万别回头啊。
scenes.preview_en: {NICKNAME}, don't look back.

scenes.preview_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「盗火者，死灰复燃，警惕。」</color>
scenes.preview_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"Watch out. The Flame Reaver is back."</color>

scenes.preview_ch: 再见，遐蝶。
scenes.preview_en: Goodbye, Castorice.

scenes.preview_ch: 他是诸王中的至高，流离者的牧人，将团结的人子高举于仇敌之上——
scenes.preview_en: Greatest of kings, protector of the displaced, raising humanity's children above their adversaries—

scenes.preview_ch: …你们打算用这种方式代替光荣的角斗？
scenes.preview_en: ...Is this your idea of an honorable duel?

scenes.preview_ch: 第 <unbreak>108642</unbreak> 次永劫回归
scenes.preview_en: The <unbreak>108,642</unbreak>nd Eternal Recurrence

scenes.preview_ch: 可、可是…那会很痛的！
scenes.preview_en: B—But... it's gonna hurt! A lot!

scenes.preview_ch: 「可正因你在痛苦，你才远比常人强大。」
scenes.preview_en: "It is because you suffer that you are so much stronger than any ordinary person."

scenes.preview_ch: 以歌耳戈之子的名义：勇士将为「纷争」而战，不以荣耀为终点，而在光荣中前行。
scenes.preview_en: In the name of the son of Gorgo: Warriors shall fight for "Strife," not with glory as their end, but to march forward in its light.

scenes.preview_ch: 终于来了，救世主们。
scenes.preview_en: You've finally arrived, Deliverers.

scenes.preview_ch: {NICKNAME}的肩膀，真的很可靠呀。
scenes.preview_en: {NICKNAME}'s shoulders are really dependable.

scenes.preview_ch: 白厄，新的一批难民都已接引入城了么？
scenes.preview_en: Phainon, has the latest batch of refugees been admitted into the city?

scenes.preview_ch: 你这是来看望我吗？
scenes.preview_en: Have you come to visit me?

scenes.preview_ch: 墙上有一尊石头雕成的狮子脑袋，大张着嘴巴。
scenes.preview_en: There is a sculpture of a lion's head on the wall, its maw wide open.

scenes.preview_ch: 今天想吃些什么，我亲自下厨。
scenes.preview_en: What would you like to eat today? I'll be the chef.

scenes.preview_ch: …人之所以独处，是为了独自享用清静——这么简单的道理，你应当明白吧？
scenes.preview_en: ...The reason people spend time alone is to enjoy peace and quiet... You must understand such a simple logic, surely?

scenes.preview_ch: 你真的要独自返乡、抵御黑潮？
scenes.preview_en: Are you really going to return home alone and face the black tide?

scenes.preview_ch: 哟！
scenes.preview_en: Yo!

scenes.preview_ch: 万敌阁下，你…怎么也来了？
scenes.preview_en: Lord Mydei, what... what brings you here?

scenes.preview_ch: 我看了刚才的对战。不错，你确实是个强劲的对手。
scenes.preview_en: I watched your recent battle. Not bad, you're indeed a formidable opponent.

scenes.preview_ch: 听说贵餐馆有位大厨在，我还以为是什么厉害角色。
scenes.preview_en: I heard your restaurant had a chef. Honestly, I was expecting them to be someone more impressive.

scenes.preview_ch: 甜蜜蜜节的反响很好呢，客人们都很喜欢我们推出的菜品。
scenes.preview_en: The Sweetie Festival was a big hit! Guests really loved the special dishes we rolled out.

scenes.preview_ch: 两位阁下，知道自己做错了什么吗？
scenes.preview_en: You two, do you realize what you've done wrong?

scenes.preview_ch: …值得回忆的事？没什么印象深刻的。
scenes.preview_en: ...Something worth remembering? Nothing really left a deep impression.

scenes.preview_ch: …就到此为止吧。
scenes.preview_en: ...That's enough for now.

scenes.preview_ch: 瞧瞧，比拳头还大的土黄豆，我还是第一次见。你那边的收获如何？
scenes.preview_en: Look here, soybeans bigger than my fist... Never seen anything like it before. How's the harvest going on your end?

scenes.preview_ch: 我不习惯做饭的时候有人看着。什么事？
scenes.preview_en: I'm not used to cooking with someone watching. What is it?

gorgo.quote_ch: 别停下你的脚步，我不记得我曾教予你「软弱」。
gorgo.quote_en: Don't stop moving forward. I don't remember ever teaching you to be "weak."

scenes.preview_ch: 朋友啊…留下吧，留在冥界，与我们一同享受这永恒静谧的月光……
scenes.preview_en: My friend... stay here. Remain in the nether realm with us and savor this eternal, serene moonlight together...

scenes.preview_ch: 欧利庞，这孩子万敌没做错任何事！
scenes.preview_en: Eurypon, the boy Mydei did nothing wrong!

scenes.preview_ch: 呵，今年的悬锋祭典还真不一般——唯一突破重围杀到朕面前的，竟是一名如此年轻、甚至有些纤弱的斗士？
scenes.preview_en: Hah, the Kremnos Festival is really something this year... To think that the only person to break through the siege and fight their way to me was such a young and rather frail-looking warrior?

scenes.preview_ch: 于此「天谴之矛」神殿、尼卡多利淬炼神锋之处，我等将举行加冕仪式。
scenes.preview_en: We will hold a coronation ceremony here, in the Lance of Fury's temple where Nikador tempered the divine blade.

scenes.preview_ch: 今天想吃些什么，我亲自下厨。
scenes.preview_en: What would you like to eat today? I'll be the chef.

euripon.quote_ch: 宁战死，毋荣归。吾儿迈德漠斯，你不肯战死，执意回归现世，也配自称悬锋人么？
euripon.quote_en: Valorous death before glorious return. My son, you refused to fall in combat and insisted on returning to the mortal world. Do you still dare call yourself a Kremnoan?

scenes.preview_ch: 朋友啊…留下吧，留在冥界，与我们一同享受这永恒静谧的月光……
scenes.preview_en: My friend... stay here. Remain in the nether realm with us and savor this eternal, serene moonlight together...

scenes.preview_ch: 欧利庞，这孩子万敌没做错任何事！
scenes.preview_en: Eurypon, the boy Mydei did nothing wrong!

scenes.preview_ch: 都一样…你和我…我们都把纷争和恐惧当做食粮……
scenes.preview_en: You and I, we're both the same... We feast on strife and fear...

scenes.preview_ch: 呵，今年的悬锋祭典还真不一般——唯一突破重围杀到朕面前的，竟是一名如此年轻、甚至有些纤弱的斗士？
scenes.preview_en: Hah, the Kremnos Festival is really something this year... To think that the only person to break through the siege and fight their way to me was such a young and rather frail-looking warrior?

scenes.preview_ch: 于此「天谴之矛」神殿、尼卡多利淬炼神锋之处，我等将举行加冕仪式。
scenes.preview_en: We will hold a coronation ceremony here, in the Lance of Fury's temple where Nikador tempered the divine blade.

scenes.preview_ch: 尊贵的王，无论如何重复预言的步骤，都会是一样的结局……
scenes.preview_en: Honorable king, it does not matter how you repeat the steps of the prophecy, the outcome will always be the same...

scenes.preview_ch: 今天想吃些什么，我亲自下厨。
scenes.preview_en: What would you like to eat today? I'll be the chef.

krateros.quote_ch: 可别跟丢了，鬣…抱歉，是宪兵队的军官们。
krateros.quote_en: Keep up with us, you hyen... oh, sorry, I meant officers.

scenes.preview_ch: 可别跟丢了，鬣…抱歉，是宪兵队的军官们。
scenes.preview_en: Keep up with us, you hyen... oh, sorry, I meant officers.

scenes.preview_ch: 糟了，是他，那悬锋城的王储……
scenes.preview_en: Drat! It's the crown prince of Castrum Kremnos...

scenes.preview_ch: 欧利庞，这孩子万敌没做错任何事！
scenes.preview_en: Eurypon, the boy Mydei did nothing wrong!

scenes.preview_ch: …克拉特鲁斯！这是怎么回事？
scenes.preview_en: ...Krateros! What's going on?

scenes.preview_ch: 你若真能带领族人打破这染血的命运，就再次证明给我看吧，迈德漠斯。
scenes.preview_en: If you're truly capable of leading our people beyond this bloodstained fate, then prove it to me once more, Mydeimos.

scenes.preview_ch: 呵。
scenes.preview_en: Heh.

scenes.preview_ch: 久违了，两位。
scenes.preview_en: It's been a while.

scenes.preview_ch: 嘻，小伊卡还是很喜欢听这些传说故事呢。你肯定也想象着，自己有朝一日能和英雄塞涅俄丝身边的翼兽一样威风吧？
scenes.preview_en: Heh, Little Ica loves listening to the stories from the legends. I'm sure you're also imagining, one day, you'll be as awe-inspiring as the winged beasts by Seliose's side?

scenes.preview_ch: …不知{NICKNAME}现在在哪。如果我被他们盯上了，那{F#她}{M#他}肯定也逃不过这遭。希望一切安好……
scenes.preview_en: ...I wonder where {NICKNAME} is now. If they're targeting me, {F#s}he definitely won't escape their notice either. I hope all is well...

scenes.preview_ch: 于此「天谴之矛」神殿、尼卡多利淬炼神锋之处，我等将举行加冕仪式。
scenes.preview_en: We will hold a coronation ceremony here, in the Lance of Fury's temple where Nikador tempered the divine blade.

scenes.preview_ch: 克拉特鲁斯，您当真要离开悬锋城？
scenes.preview_en: Krateros, are you really going to leave Castrum Kremnos?

scenes.preview_ch: 你这家伙又来了？就算你这回带上{NICKNAME}阁下一起，我也不会答应你。
scenes.preview_en: You again? Even if you brought {NICKNAME} along this time, I still won't agree.

scenes.preview_ch: 又见面了，{NICKNAME}阁下。你看上去还挺精神的。找我有什么事？
scenes.preview_en: Well, hello again, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}. You're looking rather spirited. What brings you here?

scenes.preview_ch: 克拉特鲁斯爷爷！请再讲讲您和先王那场比拼吧！
scenes.preview_en: Grandpa Krateros! Please tell us again about your showdown with the late king!

scenes.preview_ch: 后生可畏啊，好对策！
scenes.preview_en: Bold and full of potential! What a clever plan!

chartonus.quote_ch: 破坏一切，卑劣的王…来取我性命，终于？
chartonus.quote_en: Destroyed all, the wicked king... Here to take my life, finally?

scenes.preview_ch: 呃啊…！
scenes.preview_en: Urk...!

scenes.preview_ch: 大工匠，近来可好？
scenes.preview_en: Grand Craftsman, how have you been?

scenes.preview_ch: 悬锋之王，虽无印戒…却更有王相，如今。
scenes.preview_en: The King of Kremnos, without the signet ring... But looking more like a king now.

scenes.preview_ch: 哈托努斯！
scenes.preview_en: Chartonus!

scenes.preview_ch: …昔日的影子，你还没有走出。黄金裔。
scenes.preview_en: ...Out of the shadow of the past, you've not stepped, Chrysos Heir.

scenes.preview_ch: 哈托努斯…这么说来，我是听说过它为悬锋城打造圣器的故事。
scenes.preview_en: Chartonus... Come to think of it, I remember hearing about them making a holy vessel for Kremnos.
Mmm...?

scenes.preview_ch: 哈托努斯！坚持住！
scenes.preview_en: Chartonus! Hang in there!

scenes.preview_ch: 不会吧，伟大的大工匠，难道您修不好吗？
scenes.preview_en: Surely not. Grand Craftsman, are you saying that you cannot repair her?

scenes.preview_ch: 大工匠，你怎么来了？黎明云崖现在很危险，黑潮怪物纷纷从低处向云崖汇集，已经有不少圣城卫士战死了……
scenes.preview_en: Grand Craftsman, what brings you here? The Dawncloud is perilous right now. The black tide monsters are gathering from below, and many of the Holy City Guards have already fallen...

scenes.preview_ch: 我还是不掺和了。
scenes.preview_en: I'd better not get involved.

scenes.preview_ch: 异邦勇士，有何需要？
scenes.preview_en: What do you need, warrior of the outlands?

scenes.preview_ch: 叮，叮，叮。这名身材高大的工匠正在打铁。
scenes.preview_en: *ding* *ding* *ding* This tall blacksmith is forging iron.

scenes.preview_ch: 克拉特鲁斯爷爷！请再讲讲您和先王那场比拼吧！
scenes.preview_en: Grandpa Krateros! Please tell us again about your showdown with the late king!

ptolemy.note: 万敌已故战友，《悬锋诸王通鉴》作者
ptolemy.quote_ch: 「迈德漠斯，请你转告我的家人：打倒我托勒密的并非歹毒的诡计，而是翁法罗斯一切历史的重量。」
ptolemy.quote_en: "Mydeimos, please tell my family: It was not cunning schemes that vanquished Ptolemy, but the immense weight of Amphoreus' entire history."

scenes.preview_ch: …我曾经的战友们。
scenes.preview_en: ...My old comrades.

scenes.preview_ch: 快来！看看我新写的……
scenes.preview_en: Say! Come and check out what I just wrote...

perdikkas.quote_ch: 我名为帕狄卡斯…前来为我同胞复仇。
perdikkas.quote_en: My name is Perdikkas... And I am here to avenge my people.

scenes.preview_ch: 野蛮人！告诉我你的名字，好让你那可悲的命运作我酒宴上的谈资！
scenes.preview_en: Tell me your name, brute! Your demise shall be a tale I boast about at the feast table!

scenes.preview_ch: …我曾经的战友们。
scenes.preview_en: ...My old comrades.

scenes.preview_ch: 看啊，迈德漠斯回来了！
scenes.preview_en: Look, Mydeimos is back!

leon.note: 万敌战友，信使，死于暴风雪
leon.quote_ch: 「多好啊，迈德漠斯…我终于能将你成王的讯息带向冥界了……」
leon.quote_en: "This is perfect, Mydeimos... I can finally deliver the news of you ascending the throne to the nether realm..."

scenes.preview_ch: …我曾经的战友们。
scenes.preview_en: ...My old comrades.

scenes.preview_ch: 迈德漠斯！你刚训练回来吗？
scenes.preview_en: Mydeimos! Did you just come back from training?

hephaistin.quote_ch: 「身为悬锋人，却只能在床榻上了却一生…说出去要教人笑话啊。」
hephaistin.quote_en: "A Kremnoan dying on a sickbed... I would be a laughingstock to everyone."

scenes.preview_ch: …我曾经的战友们。
scenes.preview_en: ...My old comrades.

scenes.preview_ch: 别了，挚友。你一定要…带领我等还乡……
scenes.preview_en: Farewell, my dear friend. You must... lead us back home...

scenes.preview_ch: 新鲜的石榴汁，一起尝尝嘛？
scenes.preview_en: We've got fresh pomegranate juice. Want to try some?

scenes.preview_ch: …我曾经的战友们。
scenes.preview_en: ...My old comrades.

scenes.preview_ch: 真是…久违了。
scenes.preview_en: It's... been a while.

demetrios.quote_ch: 呀，是王子！王子也是来泡澡吗？
demetrios.quote_en: Hey, it's the crown prince! Are you also here for a bath?

scenes.preview_ch: 孩子们，别在这里嬉戏打闹。
scenes.preview_en: You shouldn't run around in here, kids.

scenes.preview_ch: 王子来了，快跑！
scenes.preview_en: The prince is here. Run!

scenes.preview_ch: 克拉特鲁斯爷爷！请再讲讲您和先王那场比拼吧！
scenes.preview_en: Grandpa Krateros! Please tell us again about your showdown with the late king!

gnaeus.note: 悬锋斗士（尼卡多利神性碎片）
gnaeus.quote_ch: 让注定赴死之人浪费时间，用意何在？
gnaeus.quote_en: Why stall those charging for Death's door?

scenes.preview_ch: …多么可惜！那三位斗士只差一点便能通过试炼，觐见雄伟的欧利庞王，摘得悬锋勇士的桂冠……
scenes.preview_en: ...Such a pity! Those three warriors were so close to completing the trial, to emerging as victorious Kremnoan warriors, and to earning an audience with our glorious King Eurypon!

scenes.preview_ch: 勇者…勇者！靠近些…让我看清你啊……
scenes.preview_en: Brave one... O Brave one! Come closer... Let me get a good look at you...

scenes.preview_ch: 如此惨烈…这祭典究竟是为了满足谁的欲望？
scenes.preview_en: Such carnage... whose desires does this festival truly serve...

scenes.preview_ch: 咦？格奈乌斯阁下，此行怎不见汝那伴身的爱枪了？
scenes.preview_en: Oh? Why didn't you bring your favorite spear with you on this trip, Gnaeus?
Tsk...

scenes.preview_ch: 「试炼」、「预言」…他们在讨论的话题，似乎有点耳熟呢。
scenes.preview_en: Trial, prophecy... the topics that they're discussing seem familiar.

scenes.preview_ch: 哎呀呀呀，瞧瞧你们，怎么把自己弄得这么狼狈？我在临行前，不是留下了那么多妙策吗？桀桀桀——果然没了我还是不行呀！
scenes.preview_en: Well, well, well, look at you all! How did you get yourselves into such a mess? Didn't I leave you with so many brilliant strategies before I left? Hehehe... guess you really can't do without me!

scenes.preview_ch: 呵呵…我看未必。
scenes.preview_en: Heh... I wouldn't be so sure about that.

nikador.note: 纷争之泰坦，悬锋守护神
nikador.quote_ch: 拿我打趣就免了。您美丽的脸庞写满了忧虑，我们是否都因面前这只贼灵烦忧？
nikador.quote_en: Dispense with your teasing. Your beautiful face is fraught with worry. Aren't we all vexed about this Spirithief before us?

scenes.preview_ch: 卷轴上的符文亮起，回应着你的来意；信徒们齐声念诵，赞词在你的脑海中回响——
scenes.preview_en: The runes on the scroll are glowing, responding to your intent. Disciples chant in unison, their praises echoing in your mind...

scenes.preview_ch: 卷轴上的符文亮起，回应着你的来意；信徒们齐声念诵，赞词在你的脑海中回响——
scenes.preview_en: The runes on the scroll are glowing, responding to your intent. Disciples chant in unison, their praises echoing in your mind...

castrum-kremnos-marshal.quote_ch: 勇者不与弱者共舞，悬锋之伟大由鲜血浇灌。
castrum-kremnos-marshal.quote_en: The brave do not dance with the weak. Kremnos's greatness is watered by blood.

scenes.preview_ch: 卷轴上的符文亮起，回应着你的来意；信徒们齐声念诵，赞词在你的脑海中回响——
scenes.preview_en: The runes on the scroll are glowing, responding to your intent. Disciples chant in unison, their praises echoing in your mind...

kremnos-grand-scholar.note: 悬锋城德高望重的学者
kremnos-grand-scholar.quote_ch: 战势千变万化，不可全依典籍记载。
kremnos-grand-scholar.quote_en: The tides of war are ever-changing. One cannot rely solely on records from books.

scenes.preview_ch: 卷轴上的符文亮起，回应着你的来意；信徒们齐声念诵，赞词在你的脑海中回响——
scenes.preview_en: The runes on the scroll are glowing, responding to your intent. Disciples chant in unison, their praises echoing in your mind...

nikador's-kin.quote_ch: 伟哉，吾主尼卡多利；壮哉，战争之魂不朽。
nikador's-kin.quote_en: Great is our lord Nikador; glorious, for the soul of war is eternal.

scenes.preview_ch: 卷轴上的符文亮起，回应着你的来意；信徒们齐声念诵，赞词在你的脑海中回响——
scenes.preview_en: The runes on the scroll are glowing, responding to your intent. Disciples chant in unison, their praises echoing in your mind...

undaunted-warrior.note: 请求追随尼卡多利征战的勇士
undaunted-warrior.quote_ch: 死亡有何可怖？赴战场，垂英名，纵使葬于他乡，也胜过苟延残喘的安详。
undaunted-warrior.quote_en: What is there to fear about death? March onto the battlefield, leave behind a glorious name. Even death in a foreign land is better than a life spent in idle comfort.

scenes.preview_ch: 卷轴上的符文亮起，回应着你的来意；信徒们齐声念诵，赞词在你的脑海中回响——
scenes.preview_en: The runes on the scroll are glowing, responding to your intent. Disciples chant in unison, their praises echoing in your mind...

kokopo-iii.note: 万敌的坐骑，失恋的大地兽
kokopo-iii.quote_en: Buzz buzz~ Buzz buzz buzz~ Buzz buzz~

scenes.preview_ch: 砰——你感到一阵天旋地转，耳朵嗡嗡作响。清晰的理性离你远去……
scenes.preview_en: Bang — You feel a sudden dizziness, your ears ringing loudly. Clarity and reason slip away...

scenes.preview_ch: 「忘记是普通人能做的唯一的事，但是我决定不忘记她——」
scenes.preview_en: "Forgetting is the only thing ordinary people can do, but for her, I've decided not to —"

scenes.preview_ch: 嗡嗡…呜嗡嗡！
scenes.preview_en: Grumph... Grumphhh!

scenes.preview_ch: 列队！齐步跑！紧跟殿下的步伐！
scenes.preview_en: Line up! March in step! Keep pace with His Highness!

scenes.preview_ch: 你是来探望科可波三世的吧？来得正好，看——那些悬锋人给它准备了什么！
scenes.preview_en: You're here to check on Kokopo III, right? Perfect timing — look what the Kremnoans have prepared for it!

scenes.preview_ch: 你听听这个…黑土好，充饥快！黄土好，治馋病！
scenes.preview_en: How about this... Blacksoil's good, it fills you up quick! Yellowsoil's good, it cures your cravings!

scenes.preview_ch: 我看了刚才的对战。不错，你确实是个强劲的对手。
scenes.preview_en: I watched your recent battle. Not bad, you're indeed a formidable opponent.

impetuous-kremnoan.quote_ch: 哼，还是悬锋城的土质尝起来更美味，对吧？
impetuous-kremnoan.quote_en: Hmph, but Kremnos' soil must taste better, right?

scenes.preview_ch: 列队！齐步跑！紧跟殿下的步伐！
scenes.preview_en: Line up! March in step! Keep pace with His Highness!

scenes.preview_ch: 你是来探望科可波三世的吧？来得正好，看——那些悬锋人给它准备了什么！
scenes.preview_en: You're here to check on Kokopo III, right? Perfect timing — look what the Kremnoans have prepared for him!

scenes.preview_ch: （那群悬锋族人真打算返乡吗…去奥赫玛的城门口看看吧。）
scenes.preview_en: (Are those Kremnoans really planning to go back? Maybe I should check the gates of Okhema.)

rational-kremnoan.note: 劝说众人留下的悬锋族人
rational-kremnoan.quote_ch: 就好像，大家仍在随殿下作战那般……
rational-kremnoan.quote_en: It's as if... we're still following His Highness into battle...

scenes.preview_ch: 列队！齐步跑！紧跟殿下的步伐！
scenes.preview_en: Line up! March in step! Keep pace with His Highness!

scenes.preview_ch: （那群悬锋族人真打算返乡吗…去奥赫玛的城门口看看吧。）
scenes.preview_en: (Are those Kremnoans really planning to go back? Maybe I should check the gates of Okhema.)

friendly-kremnoan.quote_ch: 可这是王的意志！你要公然违背万敌殿下的命令吗？
friendly-kremnoan.quote_en: But this is the will of our king! Are you going to openly defy Lord Mydei's orders?

scenes.preview_ch: 列队！齐步跑！紧跟殿下的步伐！
scenes.preview_en: Line up! March in step! Keep pace with His Highness!

scenes.preview_ch: 你是来探望科可波三世的吧？来得正好，看——那些悬锋人给它准备了什么！
scenes.preview_en: You're here to check on Kokopo III, right? Perfect timing — look what the Kremnoans have prepared for him!

scenes.preview_ch: （那群悬锋族人真打算返乡吗…去奥赫玛的城门口看看吧。）
scenes.preview_en: (Are those Kremnoans really planning to go back? Maybe I should check the gates of Okhema.)

golden-mane.quote_ch: 我不会…忘记您的声音。我一直…在等待这个时刻。
golden-mane.quote_en: I could never... forget your voice. I've been waiting for this moment... all along.

scenes.preview_ch: 这个大家伙，莫非是真言狮口？
scenes.preview_en: Wow, look at this big guy. Could this be Verax Leo?

scenes.preview_ch: 勇者…勇者！靠近些…让我看清你啊……
scenes.preview_en: Brave one... O Brave one! Come closer... Let me get a good look at you...

scenes.preview_ch: 勇者…勇者。上前来，上前来啊……
scenes.preview_en: Brave one... Step forth...

andriskos.quote_ch: 没错，我们都是悬锋人！听长辈说，我家以前就住在竞技场隔壁…的隔壁！
andriskos.quote_en: Yeah, we are! The grown-ups said we used to live next to the arena! ...Well, next to the parts next to it anyway!

scenes.preview_ch: 孩子们，别在这里嬉戏打闹。
scenes.preview_en: You shouldn't run around in here, kids.

scenes.preview_ch: 王子来了，快跑！
scenes.preview_en: The prince is here. Run!

scenes.preview_ch: 克拉特鲁斯爷爷！请再讲讲您和先王那场比拼吧！
scenes.preview_en: Grandpa Krateros! Please tell us again about your showdown with the late king!

marsyas.quote_ch: 我爸爸是蛇妖枪骑兵队的百夫长，妈妈是神盾旅最勇敢的战士，<color=#dbc291ff>克拉特鲁斯爷爷</color>给我家发过好多好多银币呢！
marsyas.quote_en: My dad is a centurion with the Hydra Lancers, and my mom is the bravest warrior in the Godshield Brigade. We used to get tons of silver coins from <color=#dbc291ff>Mr. Krateros</color>!

scenes.preview_ch: 孩子们，别在这里嬉戏打闹。
scenes.preview_en: You shouldn't run around in here, kids.

scenes.preview_ch: 王子来了，快跑！
scenes.preview_en: The prince is here. Run!

scenes.preview_ch: 克拉特鲁斯爷爷！请再讲讲您和先王那场比拼吧！
scenes.preview_en: Grandpa Krateros! Please tell us again about your showdown with the late king!

ulixes.quote_ch: 行了，今天就先练到这吧。小毛病很多，但大问题只有一个——
ulixes.quote_en: Alright, that's enough practice for today. There are lots of small issues, but only one major problem...

scenes.preview_ch: 行了，今天就先练到这吧。小毛病很多，但大问题只有一个——
scenes.preview_en: Alright, that's enough practice for today. There are lots of small issues, but only one major problem...

scenes.preview_ch: 来吧，我愿意向年轻人分享我的智慧和狡猾。
scenes.preview_en: Come. I am willing to share my wisdom and cunning with the youth.

scenes.preview_ch: 生面孔，你是刚来的新兵吧？如今我没什么可教你的，唯有一句：别被荣耀的枷锁束缚，去做你想做的事吧。
scenes.preview_en: New kid, you must be a fresh recruit, huh? I've got nothing much to teach you these days, just one thing: Don't let the shackles of glory hold you back. Go do whatever your heart desires.

herklas.quote_ch: 到时候就这么说吧：「我是赫克鲁斯。我以荣耀发誓，宁死也不抛弃同伴！」
herklas.quote_en: I know. I'll say: "I am Herklas. I vow upon my honor that I won't abandon my friends, even in death!"

scenes.preview_ch: 到时候就这么说吧：「我是赫克鲁斯。我以荣耀发誓，宁死也不抛弃同伴！」
scenes.preview_en: I know. I'll say: "I am Herklas. I vow upon my honor that I won't abandon my friends, even in death!"

scenes.preview_ch: 既然我们在此处相会，想必那伟大的仗已经打完了吧？
scenes.preview_en: Since we're meeting here, I take it that the great battle is already over?

erinys.quote_ch: 我不是说了吗？前一批斗士的试炼还没结束，你得先耐心等待。
erinys.quote_en: Didn't I already mention it? The trial for the previous batch of gladiators isn't over. You'll have to wait.

scenes.preview_ch: 我不是说了吗？前一批斗士的试炼还没结束，你得先耐心等待。
scenes.preview_en: Didn't I already mention it? The trial for the previous batch of gladiators isn't over. You'll have to wait.

scenes.preview_ch: 既然我们在此处相会，想必那伟大的仗已经打完了吧？
scenes.preview_en: Since we're meeting here, I take it that the great battle is already over?

aulus.quote_ch: 免费的肉片麦粥，每人一份，自主领取！
aulus.quote_en: Free meat n' wheat porridge, one for everyone, come get yours!

scenes.preview_ch: 免费的肉片麦粥，每人一份，自主领取！
scenes.preview_en: Free meat n' wheat porridge, one for everyone, come get yours!

scenes.preview_ch: 既然我们在此处相会，想必那伟大的仗已经打完了吧？
scenes.preview_en: Since we're meeting here, I take it that the great battle is already over?

georgious.quote_ch: 敲击，呐喊，欢呼…瞧瞧这地方，气氛多么热闹啊。你也是来参加祭典的勇士吗？
georgious.quote_en: Knocking, shouting, cheering... Just look at this place. Such a lively vibe. You're a warrior here to join the festival too?

scenes.preview_ch: 敲击，呐喊，欢呼…瞧瞧这地方，气氛多么热闹啊。你也是来参加祭典的勇士吗？
scenes.preview_en: Knocking, shouting, cheering... Just look at this place. Such a lively vibe. You're a warrior here to join the festival too?

scenes.preview_ch: 既然我们在此处相会，想必那伟大的仗已经打完了吧？
scenes.preview_en: Since we're meeting here, I take it that the great battle is already over?

empousa.quote_ch: 嗝…这么盛大的日子，当然要来一杯…嗝，鲜血蜜酿了。敬欧利庞王和他的勇士们！
empousa.quote_en: *hic*... Such a momentous day, of course we must have a drink with... *hic* sanguine honey brew. Praise King Eurypon and his warriors!

scenes.preview_ch: 嗝…这么盛大的日子，当然要来一杯…嗝，鲜血蜜酿了。敬欧利庞王和他的勇士们！
scenes.preview_en: *hic*... Such a momentous day, of course we must have a drink with... *hic* sanguine honey brew. Praise King Eurypon and his warriors!

scenes.preview_ch: 既然我们在此处相会，想必那伟大的仗已经打完了吧？
scenes.preview_en: Since we're meeting here, I take it that the great battle is already over?

weapon-merchant.quote_ch: 上等武器！都来看啊，悬锋城最锋利的武器！
weapon-merchant.quote_en: Finest weapons for sale! Come take a look! The sharpest blades in all of Kremnos!

scenes.preview_ch: 上等武器！都来看啊，悬锋城最锋利的武器！
scenes.preview_en: Finest weapons for sale! Come take a look! The sharpest blades in all of Kremnos!

scenes.preview_ch: …等等。
scenes.preview_en: ...Wait.

recruiter.quote_ch: …多么可惜！那三位斗士只差一点便能通过试炼，觐见雄伟的欧利庞王，摘得悬锋勇士的桂冠……
recruiter.quote_en: ...Such a pity! Those three warriors were so close to completing the trial, to emerging as victorious Kremnoan warriors, and to earning an audience with our glorious King Eurypon!

scenes.preview_ch: …多么可惜！那三位斗士只差一点便能通过试炼，觐见雄伟的欧利庞王，摘得悬锋勇士的桂冠……
scenes.preview_en: ...Such a pity! Those three warriors were so close to completing the trial, to emerging as victorious Kremnoan warriors, and to earning an audience with our glorious King Eurypon!

irate-gladiator.quote_ch: 呵！我闭关修炼了二十年，早就忘记怎么交朋友了。你让我去找两个志同道合的伙伴，不是存心刁难我吗？
irate-gladiator.quote_en: Hah! I've been training for twenty years as a recluse, and have long forgotten how to make friends. Now you're making me find two like-minded comrades? That's deliberate sabotage!

scenes.preview_ch: 我不是说了吗？前一批斗士的试炼还没结束，你得先耐心等待。
scenes.preview_en: Didn't I already mention it? The trial for the previous batch of gladiators isn't over. You'll have to wait.

scenes.preview_ch: 是眷属…当心。
scenes.preview_en: The Titan's kin... Be careful.

scenes.preview_ch: 行了，今天就先练到这吧。小毛病很多，但大问题只有一个——
scenes.preview_en: Alright, that's enough practice for today. There are lots of small issues, but only one major problem...

scenes.preview_ch: 帕…帕里斯……
scenes.preview_en: Pa... Paris...

scenes.preview_ch: 感谢你们的好意，但我这幅身躯由笨重石料铸就，比起宴会，更适合在战场上起舞。
scenes.preview_en: I'm grateful for the thought, but my stone-forged body was made to dance in battle, not during banquets.

yourdei.note: 悬锋斗士，克拉特鲁斯门徒，自称万敌十分之一
yourdei.quote_ch: …哼！现在我的实力只有吾王「万敌」的十分之一，所以我叫「十敌」。
yourdei.quote_en: Hmph! For His Majesty Mydei, every day is his day. But I am but a pale shadow of his strength, and I must seize the day — hence the name Yourdei.

scenes.preview_ch: 淘汰赛第一轮，{NICKNAME}选手将对战悬锋城的「十敌」选手。
scenes.preview_en: Opening the Elimination Rounds, {NICKNAME} will challenge Yourdei from Castrum Kremnos.

scenes.preview_ch: 吾师，我已经有了新的对策。
scenes.preview_en: Master, I've come up with a new strategy.

priest.quote_en: He will become the crown prince of a vanquished nation.

scenes.preview_ch: 尊贵的王，无论如何重复预言的步骤，都会是一样的结局……
scenes.preview_en: Honorable king, it does not matter how you repeat the steps of the prophecy, the outcome will always be the same...

ephor.quote_ch: 王欧利庞，您还在犹豫什么！
ephor.quote_en: King Eurypon, what are you waiting for!?

scenes.preview_ch: 尊贵的王，无论如何重复预言的步骤，都会是一样的结局……
scenes.preview_en: Honorable king, it does not matter how you repeat the steps of the prophecy, the outcome will always be the same...

ignis.quote_ch: 克拉特鲁斯，您当真要离开悬锋城？
ignis.quote_en: Krateros, are you really going to leave Castrum Kremnos?

scenes.preview_ch: 克拉特鲁斯，您当真要离开悬锋城？
scenes.preview_en: Krateros, are you really going to leave Castrum Kremnos?

scenes.preview_ch: 欧利庞，这孩子万敌没做错任何事！
scenes.preview_en: Eurypon, the boy Mydei did nothing wrong!
